steps.title: Find the verb form requirement
steps.content: The sentence contains “the lander spent 161 days ___ data.” After the verb spent with a time period, a specific verb form is needed to complete what action was performed.

steps.title: Apply the gerund rule
steps.content: After spent plus a time period, you must use a gerund—the -ing form of the verb. “Collecting” is the gerund expressing the action during the 161-day period. “Were collecting” and “is collecting” are finite verbs rather than gerunds, and “collected” is a past participle that doesn't work after “spent.” That matches choice A — A is correct.
